# Media Out Fault

The MEDIA OUT alert (group 2, code 1) fires when the gap or black-mark
sensor cannot detect media on the platen. The printer pauses until media
is loaded and a calibration is run.

To clear:

1. Open the printhead and feed a fresh roll of media through the guides.
2. Close the printhead and press the FEED button to advance and
   calibrate the gap/mark sensor.
3. Confirm the printer has returned to the idle state.

If the alert persists with media correctly loaded, recalibrate via
`Settings > Calibrate Sensor` from the front-panel menu.
